name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn



TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ state[i] = "idle"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
              /\ turn' = turn + 1
          \/ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ state[i] = "trying"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
              /\ turn' = turn + 1
          \/ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ state[i] = "critical"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
              /\ turn' = turn + 1
          \/ state' = state
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages



TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"INIT", "PREPARING", "COMMITTING", "ABORTING", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
  /\ messages \in [1..N -> Seq({["Prepare"])]

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "INIT"]
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> <<>>]

Prepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ coordinator' = "PREPARING"
  /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> Append(messages[i], ["Prepare"])]
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes ==
  /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = <<>> \/ <<["VoteYes"]>>
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = <<>> \/ <<["VoteNo"]>>
     => coordinator' = "ABORTING"
     /\ messages' = [j \in 1..N |-> Append(messages[j], ["Abort"])]
     /\ participants' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF messages[j] = <<>> \/ <<["VoteYes"]>> THEN "COMMITTED" ELSE "ABORTED"]
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = <<>> \/ <<["VoteYes"]>>
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = <<>> \/ <<["VoteNo"]>>
     /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTING"
     /\ messages' = [j \in 1..N |-> Append(messages[j], ["Commit"])]
     /\ participants' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF messages[j] = <<>> \/ <<["VoteYes"]>> THEN "COMMITTED" ELSE "ABORTED"]

Commit ==
  /\ coordinator = "COMMITTING"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = <<>> \/ <<["Commit"]>>
  /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTED"
  /\ UNCHANGED messages
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

Abort ==
  /\ coordinator = "ABORTING"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = <<>> \/ <<["Abort"]>>
  /\ coordinator' = "ABORTED"
  /\ UNCHANGED messages
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: a set of fork indices {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Forks == {1, 2, ..., N}

(* State: a function mapping philosopher indices to their state *)
State == [p \in Forks |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == forks = Forks /\ state = [p \in Forks |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper functions to get adjacent fork indices *)
LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

(* Predicate: philosopher p can eat if both adjacent forks are free *)
CanEat(p) == forks = Forks /\ state[p] = "hungry"

(* Action: philosopher p picks up both forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(p) == forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(p), RightFork(p)} /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher p puts down both forks and starts thinking *)
PutForks(p) == forks' = forks \cup {LeftFork(p), RightFork(p)} /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry *)
Hungry(p) == forks' = forks /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry; any hungry philosopher who can eat takes forks; any eating philosopher puts forks down *)
Next == \E p \in Forks :
          (Hungry(p) \/ (state[p] = "hungry" /\ CanEat(p) /\ TakeForks(p)) \/ (state[p] = "eating" /\ PutForks(p)))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

(* Type invariant: forks is a subset of Forks; state is a function from Forks to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == forks \subseteq Forks /\ state \in [Forks -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

ConsumerAction == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

RequestVote(term, candidateId) ==
  /\ state = Follower
  /\ term >= currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = None \/ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ currentTerm' = term
  /\ votedFor' = candidateId
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

VoteGranted(term, candidateId) ==
  /\ state = Candidate
  /\ term = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

BecomeLeader ==
  /\ state = Candidate
  /\ \A s \in Servers : s \in votes
  /\ state' = Leader
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

Next ==
  \E term \in Nat : \E candidateId \in Servers :
    RequestVote(term, candidateId)
  \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidateId \in Servers :
    VoteGranted(term, candidateId)
  \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
